methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Escalating Tensions in Syria and Iran Dominate Regional Border Concerns
bullets: Israeli military activity in Quneitra, Syria, has led to road closures and village isolations, heightening border security pressures.
US-Israeli strikes on Iranian infrastructure, including universities and a psychiatric hospital in Tehran, escalate military conflict.
Diplomatic tensions rise as Syria pledges protection of missions following embassy incidents in Damascus.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor potential Iranian retaliatory actions against US-Israeli targets in the region.
